plan_review_notes: Approved updated scope: guarded post-evaluation execution should route through Sisyphus-managed isolated execution rather than a generic callback, with explicit opt-in policy and preserved isolation guarantees.

plan_review_history.notes: Expanded the plan into a concrete automation slice: promote runner.py into a stage-aware orchestrator that composes dataset build, harness execution, constraints, fitness, and report generation in one read-only operator-invoked flow.
User requested execution. Approving the automation slice: implement a read-only stage-aware evolution runner that composes dataset, harness, constraints, fitness, and report generation.

Broaden the automation slice to include a post-evaluation stage-gated executor hook. The runner should compose dataset build, harness execution, constraints, fitness, and report generation, then optionally invoke a follow-up executor only when guards and promotion eligibility pass.
Approved broadened scope: add a guarded post-evaluation executor hook to the evolution runner while keeping mutation/promotion policy explicit and opt-in.

Broaden the execution slice from a generic post-evaluation callback to Sisyphus-managed self-hosted execution. After dataset build, harness execution, constraint evaluation, fitness evaluation, and report generation, the runner may optionally request guarded follow-up execution via Sisyphus in an isolated task/worktree only when guardrails pass. Keep policy explicit and injectable; do not mutate the current repo worktree directly.

Approved updated scope: guarded post-evaluation execution should route through Sisyphus-managed isolated execution rather than a generic callback, with explicit opt-in policy and preserved isolation guarantees.

spec_review_notes: Freeze updated scope to a stage-aware evolution runner plus an opt-in Sisyphus-managed follow-up execution request. The runner may automatically trigger isolated self-hosted execution only after constraints pass and promotion eligibility is satisfied. Exclude silent live-worktree mutation and keep guard/promotion policy explicit.

normal_cases.name: An automated evolution run can progress from run planning through report generation and guarded Sisyphus follow-up launch in one call.

edge_cases.name: Narrowed task or target scope still produces a stable reported result when follow-up execution is not requested.

exception_cases.name: A stage failure returns actionable failure metadata without mutating the live repository worktree.

verification_methods.target: An automated evolution run can progress from run planning through report generation and guarded Sisyphus follow-up launch in one call.
Narrowed task or target scope still produces a stable reported result when follow-up execution is not requested.
A stage failure returns actionable failure metadata without mutating the live repository worktree.

subtasks.title: An automated evolution run can progress from run planning through report generation in one call.

A stage failure returns actionable failure metadata without mutating repository files.
